title: GenesisOrigins Pack
description: Bringing custom textures to the GenesisMC Origins Mod.
body:
A texture pack for the GenesisMC Origins Mod.

Currently adds
- Custom Orb of Origins Texture
- Custom Keybinds Textures (1 and 2)

**DISCLAIMER:**
The pack only works with the Genesis MC Origins Mod that you can find in the related projects.
The pack needs Optifine or CIT Resewn to see the custom item textures. CIT Resewn does not currently work for versions above 1.20.1 so you will need to find a fork of it.

Thanks to:
_GreyMC - Pack Creator

Alexzander700 - CIT Code

Dueris - Mod Creator
